plugin_desc: The purpose of the website monitoring plugin is to periodically check the availability and performance of HTTP/HTTPS connections.
name: Website

metrics.name: http_response_result_code
metrics.unit: [{"name":"成功","id":0,"color":"#1ac44a"},{"name":"响应内容不匹配","id":1,"color":"#faad14"},{"name":"响应体读取失败","id":2,"color":"#faad14"},{"name":"连接失败","id":3,"color":"#ff4d4f"},{"name":"超时","id":4,"color":"#ff4d4f"},{"name":"DNS错误","id":5,"color":"#ff4d4f"},{"name":"响应状态码不匹配","id":6,"color":"#faad14"}]
metrics.description: Represents the Telegraf http_response result_code field. It identifies whether the probe succeeded or failed due to content mismatch, body read error, connection failure, timeout, DNS error, or status code mismatch.

metrics.name: http_node_success_rate
metrics.query: (sum without (result) (count_over_time(http_response_result_type{result="success",__$labels__}[5m])) or sum without (result) (count_over_time(http_response_result_type{__$labels__}[5m])) * 0) / sum without (result) (count_over_time(http_response_result_type{__$labels__}[5m])) * 100
metrics.description: Calculate the 5-minute probe success rate for each probing node, reflecting the access experience in a specific region or network environment.

metrics.name: http_response_response_time
metrics.description: Represents the total time taken from initiating an HTTP request to receiving the HTTP response. It is used to assess the performance of web services, especially when handling user requests.

metrics.name: http_response_http_response_code
metrics.description: This metric represents the HTTP response status code for an HTTP request. It captures the value of the HTTP response status codes, such as 200 (OK), 404 (Not Found), 500 (Internal Server Error), etc.

metrics.name: http_response_content_length
metrics.description: This metric indicates the length of the HTTP. Larger content lengths can result in extended data transfer times and consume more bandwidth.
